_comment: Core MirrorTrace actors are wired to the roger_1of1 Apify workspace. Configure task and webhook resources separately after choosing operator endpoints.

stages.role: A0 — Standby real-time API + compliance gate. Validates scope_type, rejects prohibited scopes, then metamorphs into discovery. The ONLY entry point.
A2 — enumerate public, logged-out sources for the vetted subject.
A3 — adaptive crawl + evidence capture with compliance backoff.
A6 — compliant scoring + Closure Mode report. Terminal stage.

rules.single_entry: policy-gate is the only stage that may be invoked directly; all others are reachable ONLY via metamorph from the previous stage.
rules.reassert_scope_every_hop: Each stage re-runs validateScope on the inherited input before doing any work; a hop can never widen scope.
rules.no_self_invoke_from_standby: A Standby HTTP request can ONLY trigger the chain through the gate; it cannot target a downstream stage.
